'''Hariz''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[N'zoth]],<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> located 150 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] southeast of [[Giat Nor]]. The city included the [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] called [[Hariz Downside]], and outdoor markets. It was connected to Giat Nor by a [[Hovertrain/Legends|hovertrain]]. It was within Hariz that [[Nil Spaar]] reappeared after fleeing [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was one of the only cities that allowed non-[[Yevetha]]ns to walk around unaccompanied. Spaar's flagship, the [[Aramadia (Super Star Destroyer)|''Aramadia'']], was stored here.
